name: Craft CMS
description: Developer-friendly commercial CMS with powerful content modeling and native GraphQL

description.value: Developer-friendly commercial CMS with powerful content modeling and native GraphQL

license.comment: Source-available but proprietary license; free Solo tier, paid Team/Pro tiers

cms-type.comment: Traditional with Twig templating; built-in GraphQL API and headless mode for decoupled frontends

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted; Craft Cloud available as managed hosting option

primary-language.comment: PHP 77.8% of codebase; built on Yii framework

api-type.comment: Built-in GraphQL API since Craft 3.3; no REST API in core (available via plugins)

multi-tenancy.comment: Multi-site support from single installation with per-site content and locales

static-site-generation.comment: Works as content source for Next.js, Gatsby, Nuxt via GraphQL API

edge-deployment.comment: Craft Cloud includes global CDN; self-hosted can be deployed behind CDN

content-types.comment: Flexible content modeling with Sections (Singles, Channels, Structures), Categories, Tags, Users, Globals, and custom element types

custom-fields.comment: All content types support custom fields; fields centrally managed

field-types.comment: 23 built-in field types including Address, Assets, Categories, Checkboxes, Color, Date, Dropdown, Email, Entries, Icon, Lightswitch, Matrix, Money, Multi-select, Number, Plain Text, Radio Buttons, Table, Tags, Time, URL, Users

content-relationships.comment: Entries, Categories, Tags, Users, and Assets fields support relationships between content

nested-components.comment: Matrix field supports nested entries (Matrix in Matrix); reusable content blocks

localization.comment: Unlimited locales and languages; control panel translated into 25+ languages

content-validation.comment: Field validation rules including required, unique, URL format, email format, regex patterns

embedded-interactives.comment: Matrix fields can embed rich components; plugins extend embedding capabilities

content-versioning.comment: Built-in revision system; view and revert to previous versions

draft-publish.comment: Sophisticated draft system with forking, merging, and provisional drafts

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule drafts for future publication; requires scheduled job or external cron

approval-workflows.comment: No built-in approval workflows; available via Workflow plugin by Verbb

content-locking.comment: No native content locking to prevent concurrent editing; handled through drafts

audit-logging.comment: No built-in audit logging; available via Activity Log or Audit plugins

media-library.comment: Built-in asset management organized in volumes and filesystems

image-transformations.comment: Named and ad-hoc transforms with crop modes, focal points, and format conversion

external-media-storage.comment: Official plugins for Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage; supports DigitalOcean Spaces and other S3-compatible services

video-support.comment: Native video upload as assets; HLS streaming via plugin; embed support for external videos

svg-support.comment: SVG upload with optional sanitization; svg() Twig function for inline rendering

folder-organization.comment: Assets organized in volumes with folder structure; custom fields on folders

role-based-access.comment: User groups with customizable permissions (Team/Pro tiers); Solo limited to one admin

granular-permissions.comment: Section-level and entry-type-level permissions; field-level not available natively

sso-saml.comment: SAML SSO available in Enterprise tier

team-collaboration.comment: No built-in comments, assignments, or notifications; available via plugins

audience-restrictions.comment: User permissions can restrict content access; membership plugins available for public-facing restrictions

typescript-sdk.comment: No official TypeScript SDK; community Query API plugin provides TypeScript types and auto-generation

content-type-sdk.comment: Project Config stores content model as YAML; can be version-controlled and deployed

cli-tools.comment: Built-in CLI (php craft) for migrations, cache clearing, project config sync, and more

local-development.comment: Full local development with DDEV, Laravel Valet, or custom PHP environment

webhooks.comment: No built-in webhooks; available via first-party Webhooks plugin

plugin-system.comment: Extensive plugin ecosystem via Plugin Store; Composer-based installation

admin-ui-customization.comment: Control panel branding in Pro tier; custom widgets and field types via plugins

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with getting started tutorials, comprehensive reference, plugin development guides, and video courses via CraftQuest

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official Next.js starter project; works with Nuxt, Gatsby, React, Vue via GraphQL API

search-integration.comment: Built-in search with database indexing; Algolia and Elasticsearch plugins available

preview-mode.comment: Built-in Live Preview with auto-refresh; supports headless preview via token-based draft access

ecommerce-integration.comment: First-party Craft Commerce plugin ($299/project); integrations with Stripe, payment gateways

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; plugins available for Google Analytics, Fathom, and other providers

ai-features.comment: No native AI features; can integrate with AI services via custom plugins

cdn-included.comment: Craft Cloud includes CDN; self-hosted requires separate CDN configuration

response-caching.comment: Built-in template caching and element query caching; static caching via plugins

rate-limits.comment: No rate limits for self-hosted; Craft Cloud limits not documented

global-regions.comment: Craft Cloud provides global CDN; self-hosted can be deployed in any region

free-tier.comment: Solo tier is free forever (single admin); Team ($279) and Pro ($399) are one-time purchases with optional annual updates

open-source.comment: Source-available on GitHub but proprietary license; not open source

pricing-model.comment: Free Solo tier; Team $279/project, Pro $399/project (one-time); $99/year for updates; 15% nonprofit discount

commercial-support.comment: Developer-to-developer support from core team on Team/Pro tiers; premium support on Enterprise

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise tier includes SAML SSO, custom licensing, procurement support, dedicated premium support
